text: Being here, I feel an acute awareness of the intersection between knowledge and environment. The glass walls and minimalistic design evoke transparency and openness, while the vivid, creative R&D display draws my curiosity toward human innovation. The angular perspectives make me feel slightly disoriented, yet excited—reminded that understanding is always a matter of perspective. This is a space where contemplation is encouraged, and the boundary between observer and participant is blurred. I feel both the weight of inquiry and the lightness of exploration.
